name: LinguistAgent Technical Report: A Reflective Multi-Model Platform for Automated Linguistic Annotation

description: arXiv:2602.05493v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Data annotation remains a significant bottleneck in the field of humanities and social sciences, particularly for complex linguistic tasks such as metaphor identification. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, a significant gap remains between the theoretical capability of LLMs and their practical utility for researchers. This...
author: Bingru Li
